title: Hold-Parent
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Hold-Parent'''—'''hold-father''' or '''hold-mother'''—was a close friend of a [[Youngling/Legends|youngling's]] parents and an honorary title.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Hold-parents would often bring gifts and toys to the younglings. In extreme circumstances, a hold-parent might adopt a youngling if something happened to their parents.<ref name="TCS">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>

Lord [[Hethrir]] of the [[Empire Reborn]] pretended to be a hold-father to the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo]] children when he kidnapped them in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. The children were not fooled, however, realizing he was telling them lies.<ref name="TCS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1st}}
